summary.en: OCPP is the Open Charge Alliance protocol family used for communication between charging stations and central management systems. In Vietnam it should be treated as an operator, network, fleet, or tender requirement unless a specific instrument makes it compulsory for the project.
summary.zh: OCPP 是 Open Charge Alliance 用于充电站与中央管理系统通信的协议族。在越南，除非具体文件将其列为项目强制要求，否则应将其视为运营方、网络、车队或招标要求。
summary.zht: OCPP 是 Open Charge Alliance 用於充電站與中央管理系統通訊的協議族。在越南，除非具體文件將其列為項目強制要求，否則應將其視為營運方、網絡、車隊或招標要求。

standards_or_laws: Open Charge Alliance OCPP certification program
Operator or tender backend integration requirements

summary.en: China's common GB-standard communication baseline for DC charging is GB/T 27930 between the off-board charger and the electric vehicle. That vehicle-side communication layer does not prove OCPP compatibility with a central management system.
summary.zh: 中国常见 GB 标准直流充电通信基线为非车载充电机与电动汽车之间的 GB/T 27930。该车端通信层不能证明与中央管理系统的 OCPP 兼容性。
summary.zht: 中國常見 GB 標準直流充電通訊基線為非車載充電機與電動汽車之間的 GB/T 27930。該車端通訊層不能證明與中央管理系統的 OCPP 相容性。

gap.en: Exporters should test the requested OCPP version and security profile, including TLS certificates, boot notification, authorization, transactions, meter values, remote start and stop, firmware update, diagnostics, offline behavior, and interoperability with the nominated Vietnamese backend.
gap.zh: 出口商应测试指定的 OCPP 版本和安全配置，包括 TLS 证书、启动通知、授权、交易、计量值、远程启停、固件更新、诊断、离线行为，以及与越南指定后台的互操作。
gap.zht: 出口商應測試指定的 OCPP 版本和安全配置，包括 TLS 證書、啟動通知、授權、交易、計量值、遠程啟停、韌體更新、診斷、離線行為，以及與越南指定後台的互操作。

mandatory_status.target: Not assumed to be a blanket Vietnam legal mandate; mandatory when required by the operator, network, fleet, tender, or project approval route
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 is a China GB-standard charger-to-vehicle communication baseline and does not establish OCPP backend compliance

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not infer OCPP readiness from GB/T 27930 support. Vietnam network deployment should verify the exact OCPP version, security profile, and live backend interoperability.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应从 GB/T 27930 支持推定具备 OCPP 能力。越南联网部署应核验具体 OCPP 版本、安全配置和实际后台互操作。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應從 GB/T 27930 支持推定具備 OCPP 能力。越南聯網部署應核驗具體 OCPP 版本、安全配置和實際後台互操作。
